cards.back: A method of encryption where a secret codebook is used to translate plaintext into ciphertext

cards.front: What is the main advantage of a Codebook Cipher
cards.back: It is relatively simple to implement and has a fast encryption speed

cards.front: What is the main disadvantage of a Codebook Cipher
cards.back: It is easily broken by a determined attacker due to limited key space

cards.front: What is the purpose of the key in a Codebook Cipher
cards.back: The key is used to select the encryption and decryption processes from the codebook

cards.front: What type of encryption uses a codebook
cards.back: It uses frequency analysis or Kasiski examination to determine the key
